free_text: Production of radionuclides in interaction of
3.65-AGeV 12C nuclei with silver
Silver, thickness 0.3 g/cm**2 was used.
No information.
No information about source of uncertainties
-By compiler- decay-data are absent.
-By authors - secondary effects are not included in
data analysis.
Tbl. on p.498 of 91MINSK,,498,1991
by FCh
. last checking has been done.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrections in all Subents. EN added.

could not be excluded.

-By compiler- the authors believed this yield as
independent. But published data do not include Se-72
production cross section. Se-72 is possible precursor
for As-72.
